description: iPath Series B S&P 500 VIX Short-Term Futures ETN is an exchange traded note launched by Barclays Bank PLC. The note seeks to track the performance of the S&P 500 VIX Short-Term Futures Index TR. The index represents the public equity markets of the United States. It comprises of short-term futures contracts on the CBOE Volatility Index. The index represents stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. It comprises of volatile stocks of large-cap companies. The ETN will mature on January 23, 2048. iPath Series B S&P 500 VIX Short-Term Futures ETN was formed on January 17, 2018 and is domiciled in the United Kingdom.
